Limbach HoldingsNASDAQ · LMB

Sample briefing · Wyatt → Max, Ironsite

Why Limbach

Public mechanical contractor in the eastern US. FY25 revenue guidance $650-680M, ~1,400 craft-heavy team, six verticals with healthcare and industrial leading. The pivot toward Owner Direct Relationships is what makes it interesting: ODR hit 76.6% of Q3 2025 revenue, T&M runs ~1/3 of ODR, so the annual T&M book is roughly $165-175M. That's the wedge.

Revenue FY25e
$650-680M
Gross margin FY25 guide
25.5-26.5% cut from 28-29%
ODR · Q3'25
76.6%
T&M share of ODR
~1/3
T&M run-rate
$165-175M/yr
Craft
Union majority

Four industrial mechanical acquisitions closed in 18 months: Pioneer Power ($66.1M, Jul 2025, adds ~$120M annualized from 2026), Consolidated Mechanical (2024, KY/MI/IL, $23M), ACME Industrial Piping (2024), Industrial Air (2024). Four field-ops cultures to integrate, different craft locals.

Sources: FY2024 results (Mar 10, 2025) · Q3 2025 transcript · Pioneer Power acquisition · FY2024 10-K

Three public signals from the last 12 months

Q3 2025 call: gross margin guide cut to 25.5-26.5%, T&M is ~1/3 of ODR.

Nov 27, 2025 · Q3 2025 earnings call transcript · Strong
→ On a $165-175M T&M book, a 50 bps billing-accuracy gain is real money. Camera-on-helmet footage ties billed T&M hours to observed install activity. Margin defense in the fastest-growing segment.

Pioneer Power closes: four industrial mechanical acquisitions in 18 months.

Jul 1, 2025 · Acquisition press release · Strong
→ Four field-ops cultures, four tool stacks, different craft locals. Per-worker productivity data is the fastest way to normalize output across the acquired companies without a multi-year ERP lift.

Nick Angerosa promoted to EVP National Customer Solutions (from Pres, Southeast).

Jan 13, 2026 · Limbach press release · Strong
→ Fresh EVP, ops background, national remit, stated focus on data center and industrial. Short political window to place a category bet.

Who to call, and why them

Nick Angerosa

EVP, National Customer Solutions · Limbach

Primary13 yrs at LimbachEx-Pres, SE Region

Appointed to the new national role on Jan 13, 2026. Came up through regional operations, not sales. New remit covers national customer accounts, with a stated focus on data centers and industrial.

Route in: LinkedIn note referencing the appointment plus one line on what a week-01 readout would look like for a Pioneer Power or CMI crew. 15 minutes, one crew, one scope.

LinkedIn · Appointment release

Jayme Brooks

EVP & CFO · Limbach

BackupMargin defense angle

Q3 2025 guidance cut gross margin from 28-29% to 25.5-26.5%. Per-worker data is one of the few things a CFO can point at for FY26 margin defense.

Limbach leadership page

What I can't see from public data

Four hours of desk research gets you what's above. What it can't get, and what would actually matter to close:

  • Active T&M dispute status. Whether any current Limbach ODR contract is sitting in a billing dispute right now. Court dockets aren't indexed by contractor, and owner AR aging isn't public.
  • Which UA local rep has cleared a wearable-camera MOU before. A handful of precedents exist in union mechanical. Which ones apply to Pioneer Power's Midwest footprint is a 20-minute call to a local rep, not desk research.
  • A warm-intro path to Angerosa. Whether anyone on Ironsite's team, investors, or advisors has a 2nd-degree connection to him or to a Limbach regional president. That's a graph lookup from inside your own LinkedIn, not mine.
Wyatt Zoia · wyatthenryzoia@gmail.com
